matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU Hough plate 42 prints CARPINUS CAROLINEANA / Hornbeam and labels the middle specimen RADIAL SECTION. Modern ITIS-backed nomenclature documents Carpinus carolineana as the historical spelling of Carpinus caroliniana.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at the derived native crop resolution. The pale exposed radial face fills the image and shows subtle horizontal figure and ray fleck; no tree, bark, leaves, furniture, flooring, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries

matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU Hough plate 42 prints CARPINUS CAROLINEANA / Hornbeam and labels the lower specimen TANGENTIAL SECTION. ITIS-backed nomenclature identifies the current spelling as Carpinus caroliniana.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at the derived native crop resolution. The pale exposed tangential face fills the frame with soft cathedral figure and a few natural darker marks; no living plant, bark-only area, finished product, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries
